title: The Primiti� To Parents.
content:
Our household-gods our parents be;
    And manners good require that we
    The first fruits give to them, who gave
    Us hands to get what here we have.
meaning:
"The Primiti� To Parents." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
